layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — patience beats impulse right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a fearful state with a Fear & Greed reading of just 26. Bitcoin is relatively stable around $64,000 but is hoarding market share at 56.3% dominance, which means altcoins are getting crushed. Most of the coins we're watching are in downtrends with bearish chart structures. While a few coins like TRUMP and ZRO are reaching oversold levels where bounces historically happen, the broader environment is hostile for altcoins and none of the setups have strong enough confirmation to justify risking capital right now.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is fearful and altcoins are bleeding. A better entry will come when we see a confirmed bounce or a strong news catalyst. Don't try to catch a falling knife.
expert_reasoning: Across all swing candidates, the environment is deeply unfavorable for altcoins: BTC dominance at 56.3% is actively compressing alt valuations, and Fear & Greed at 26 with an 'improving' trend suggests we haven't yet reached the capitulation-level fear (sub-15) that historically precedes strong alt bounces. ZRO's RSI at 30.83 and proximity to $0.90 support with a theoretical 16.5x R/R is the most compelling technical setup, but the chart bias is bearish (-0.70), price is below all moving averages, and there's no bullish candlestick confirmation pattern. TRUMP has an even deeper oversold RSI (29) but is down 97.9% from ATH — a classic value trap with structural selling pressure from the negative CryptoSlate headline about Trump's crypto disclosure. ETHFI has the only bullish chart (+0.60) with a Bullish Marubozu, but the 0.11x R/R ratio is terrible — resistance is only 2.5% away while support is 23% down. No candidate passes the combined test of oversold technicals + bullish chart confirmation + positive catalyst.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% and rising creates persistent headwinds for all altcoin positions
Fear & Greed at 26 is fearful but not at capitulation levels — further downside is very possible
No volume breakout or MACD cross confirmation on any candidate — our highest-conviction historical signals are absent
watch_list: ZRO price action at $0.90 support — a confirmed bounce with volume would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index movement — a drop below 15 or a sharp reversal above 35 would signal inflection
BTC dominance trend — any decline below 55% would signal capital rotation back into alts
market_context: Bitcoin is consolidating around $64K with modest weekly gains, but altcoins are bleeding badly as BTC dominance climbs to 56.3%. The market is in 'Fear' at 26/100 with bearish news flow around crypto IPOs stalling and institutional selling (Empery Digital), offset slightly by bullish ETH tokenization narratives.
context_banner: Altcoins are under siege from rising BTC dominance and fearful sentiment — capital preservation trumps speculative entries until a confirmed reversal appears.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 ('Fear') with improving trend — not yet at capitulation but conditions favor patience over aggression.
ZRO (30.8) and TRUMP (29.0) are in oversold territory, historically bounce zones, but neither has bullish confirmation candles yet.
Trump crypto disclosure headline creates headwind for TRUMP token, removing it as a viable bounce candidate despite deep oversold conditions.
Bitcoin 'nearing late stages of bear market' analysis from Real Vision suggests macro bottom forming, but timeline is weeks-to-months not days.
No volume breakout detected on any candidate — our most reliable signal (100% win rate, +13.4% avg return) is completely absent this cycle.
